segment.source: Renders an even two- or three-column grid of uniform quote cards — each with quote, author avatar, name, and title — under an optional eyebrow and heading. Use it for: collections of roughly three to nine customer quotes, reviews sections on homepages or landing pages, 'what our customers say' blocks from a source document. Prefer 'Testimonial Wall' for many quotes in a masonry layout; use 'Carousel Testimonial' when space is tight.
